summary: A brief biographical overview of Judy Faulkner, founder and CEO of Epic Systems. The article outlines her educational background, the founding of Epic Systems, and her core business philosophies regarding company ownership and growth, specifically her commitments to remaining privately held and growing organically without acquisitions.

principles.statement: A company should be homegrown and grow organically.
principles.rationale: Faulkner prides herself on Epic being homegrown and has avoided acquiring any other companies to achieve growth.

principles.statement: Remain privately held and avoid outside institutional investment.
principles.rationale: She has avoided venture capital and private equity, and explicitly stated the company will never go public.

anti_patterns.description: Growing a business through corporate acquisitions.
Taking venture capital, private equity, or taking a company public.
